creator: toidin@gmail.com
text:
I hope all of you can help me to solve my problem, i want to just loaded
FreeBSD 6.3 and 6.4 RELEASE, can detected interface on server IBM X 3550 M2
type 7946, because on the server did not recognize the onboard and PCI-
Express network adapter.

and this is detail from card:

-Broadcom NetXtreme II 5709 Dual Port Ethernet PCIe Card
-Devive id: 14E4.1639
-Vendor id: Broadcom NetXtreme II Gigabit Ethernet BCM5709C

And this server does have Two PCI-Express (x16) Gen 2 slotsone half-length,
full-height and one low-profile; each slot convertible to PCI-X with riser
option.

Thanks for all.
